> **Source:** IM8 / T003 / Script #1 — 90-Day Joint & Recovery Timeline
> **Structure:** Benefits Timeline

## Script #1 — 90-Day Joint & Recovery Timeline (Actor UGC)

**Persona:** Fitness / Joint & Recovery
**Structure:** Benefits Timeline (Progression Timeline)
**Duration:** ~50 seconds
**Caption style:** Bold sans-serif + milestone cards (body) / Subtitle-only auto-generated style (hooks)

---

Reach Digital_IM8_Fitness_Timeline_01_T003

### Concept
A fit young male actor speaks directly to camera about his 90-day recovery transformation on IM8. Same milestone framework as T001 Script #1 (first sip, Day 9, Day 21, Day 90), same key ingredients, but entirely rewritten copy with fresh scaffolding, failed alternatives woven into the body, and distinct hook/close executions. The UGC green-screen format over gym B-roll feels native and unproduced. The actor's own training experience anchors every claim.

### Visual Direction
- **B-roll:** Gym training footage (squats, deadlifts, stretching, foam rolling), active recovery moments. Aspirational but grounded and relatable.
- **CGI:** Brief 3D cutaways at milestone transitions (joint tissue cross-section, mushroom mycelium network). 2-3s max, then back to actor or lifestyle.
- **Edit pace:** Dynamic, conversational. 1.5-2s cuts behind the actor during body. Milestone card holds for 2s.
- **Color:** Cool/muted for problem state (hooks, Beat 1), warming progressively through milestones to golden/warm at Day 90 and close.

### References
**Top Spender**

**Format**
- [Ad 04 - 10-Month Creator Partnership (Tavi Castro)](https://projects.motionapp.com/organization/6214fe5e1ccc60d23897d87b/69c47af63ea1439320c71f37)
	- Corner-box / full-frame alternation, narrator-over-B-roll compositing, native UGC feel

### Hook Variation A — Curiosity Gap

| Time | Visual | Voiceover | On-Screen Captions |
|---|---|---|---|
| 0:00–0:06 | Actor full frame, holding a glass of IM8. Cuts to green screen over heavy squat B-roll. | This is exactly what happens to your joints when you drink IM8 every day for 90 days. | THE SUPPLEMENT STACK YOUR JOINTS ACTUALLY NEED |

### Hook Variation B — Pain Point / Relatability

| Time | Visual | Voiceover | On-Screen Captions |
|---|---|---|---|
| 0:00–0:06 | Actor green screen over footage of someone grimacing while stretching/foam rolling between sets. | My joints used to ache for days after lifting. Here's what happened after 90 days on IM8. | ❌ GLUCOSAMINE<br>❌ FISH OIL<br><br>YOUR JOINTS NEED MORE THAN THIS |

### Hook Variation C — Time Progression

| Time | Visual | Voiceover | On-Screen Captions |
|---|---|---|---|
| 0:00–0:06 | Direct-to-camera, no green screen. Actor in kitchen, natural light, holding IM8 sachet mid-mix. Casual, handheld. | Day 1 to Day 90 on IM8. Here's why my recovery completely changed. | STILL SORE ON DAY 3?<br><br>YOUR STACK HAS GAPS |
